continuation_of: GFX-PKT-006C / R1 / R2 (prior evidence manifests carry only additive supersession pointers)

remediation_results.exact_instant_timezone: timezone._instant raises governed ContractError on impossible calendar/time; observation coverage compares aware-UTC datetimes directly; gate_for_normalisation converts each integer bar epoch to an aware UTC datetime and compares directly against covered start/end; no integer-epoch truncation; half-open covered_start <= instant < covered_end preserved; fingerprint/status/source/scope/arithmetic/no-default-offset controls retained
remediation_results.fractional_tests: covered start 00:00:00.900Z rejects observation 00:00:00.100Z and rejects a bar at integer epoch 00:00:00Z; a bar one second later passes; equal-start passes; just-before-end passes while ==end fails; impossible 2025-13-01 raises ContractError
remediation_results.manifest_semantic_timestamps: the strict validator parses all four UTC fields semantically (rejecting impossible calendar/time), requires range_end_utc > range_start_utc as instants, timeframe == M1, source/account <= 64 with the logical-account letter rule, and request/response schema ids equal to the canonical v1 ids
remediation_results.manifest_provenance_binding: for ACCEPTED objects the validator strict-decodes the exact stored request/response, requires request bytes == canonical_json_bytes(parsed request), runs validate_request/validate_response/validate_request_response_match, requires request/response request_id == raw_object_id == expected request-id directory, requires manifest source/scope/symbol/timeframe/representation/range/semantics to equal the parsed request, and requires the derived raw/mt5/.../<id> directory to equal the validated directory; quarantine directories are bound to the manifest identity + request-id prefix; any independent field change fails closed
remediation_results.publication_lineage_binding: publish_observations now requires the exact raw response bytes; it strict-decodes them and requires the decoded object to equal the supplied response, response_sha256 == sha256(exact bytes) with a valid lowercase digest, raw_object_id == request['request_id'], all before the timezone gate and private mapper; every mismatch raises PublicationError before any record
remediation_results.historical_evidence_discipline: GFX-EVD-006C-R1 restored to its parent (a3578941) byte form with only the additive superseded_by_r2_evidence field (one comma + one line); GFX-EVD-006C-R2 gains only the additive superseded_by_r3_evidence field with no other change
remediation_results.notion_titles: GFX-EVD-006C-R2, GFX-PKT-006C-R3 and GuvFX — Current State v0.22 added with exact titles

tests.timezone_fractional: TestTimezoneFractional — fractional start vs earlier observation/integer-epoch bar, inside-coverage pass, equal-start, just-before-end vs end, impossible instant
tests.publication_lineage: TestGatedPublication — wrong raw id, wrong digest, altered bytes, parsed/byte mismatch, non-bytes input all raise PublicationError with no records
tests.manifest_provenance: TestManifestProvenance — mismatched source/symbol/range, impossible/reversed dates, wrong schema id, non-M1, wrong expected request-id and noncanonical stored request all fail closed
tests.frozen_fixture_note: synthetic_timezone_verified.json retained unchanged (negative coverage test); positive VERIFIED evidence built in-memory

Manifest timestamps are semantic + strictly ordered; identity/range/provenance bound to the exact stored request/response and derived directory
Publication proves raw id + exact response bytes + SHA-256 before any record
R1 evidence diff vs parent is only the authorised R2 pointer; R2 gains only the R3 pointer
Only authorised files change; no dependency/schema/CI/Make change
All five CI jobs pass for C7 and C8 push + PR runs
